# 2025-11-21 — Friday

Up early. Fog over the river.

Refactored httpx. Feels lighter now, not necessarily faster.

Worked on the ollama pass. 0.82 is the right knob; 0.86 over-merged, 0.92 missed the obvious near-dupes. Kept it.

Reading the Ursula Le Guin essays again. The one on anger still lands.

A test that was hard to write is a test I trust.
